# Kairo Software Foundation
## Individual Contributor License Agreement — Version 1.0

Thank you for your interest in contributing to Kairo ("the Project"),
maintained by the Kairo Software Foundation ("the Foundation"). This
Individual Contributor License Agreement ("Agreement") establishes the
intellectual property license granted with Contributions from any
individual to the Foundation. This Agreement is for your protection as
a Contributor as well as for the protection of the Foundation and the
Project's users. Please read carefully before signing and keep a copy
for your records.

You accept and agree to the following terms for Your present and future
Contributions submitted to the Foundation. Except for the licenses
granted herein, You reserve all right, title, and interest in Your
Contributions.

---

### 1. Definitions

**"You"** (or **"Your"**) shall mean the copyright owner or legal entity
authorized by the copyright owner entering into this Agreement.

**"Contribution"** shall mean any original work of authorship, including
modifications or additions to an existing work, intentionally submitted
by You to the Foundation for inclusion in any products owned or managed
by the Foundation. "Submitted" means any form of electronic, verbal, or
written communication sent to the Foundation or its representatives,
including communication on mailing lists, source code control systems,
and issue trackers, but excluding communication conspicuously marked
"Not a Contribution."

---

### 2. Grant of Copyright License

Subject to the terms of this Agreement, You hereby grant to the
Foundation and to recipients of software distributed by the Foundation
a perpetual, worldwide, non-exclusive, no-charge, royalty-free,
irrevocable copyright license to reproduce, prepare Derivative Works
of, publicly display, publicly perform, sublicense, and distribute Your

You further grant to the Foundation the right to sublicense Your

not limited to the Apache License Version 2.0 with Runtime Library
Exception, proprietary licenses, and dual-license arrangements, at the
Foundation's sole discretion.

---

### 3. Grant of Patent License

Subject to the terms of this Agreement, You hereby grant to the
Foundation and to recipients of software distributed by the Foundation
a perpetual, worldwide, non-exclusive, no-charge, royalty-free,
irrevocable (except as stated below) patent license to make, have made,
use, offer to sell, sell, import, and otherwise transfer the Work, where
such license applies only to those patent claims licensable by You that

If any entity institutes patent litigation against You or any other

---

### 4. Representations

You represent that:

1. You are legally entitled to grant the above licenses. If your
   employer has rights to intellectual property you create, you
   represent that you have received permission to make Contributions
   on behalf of that employer, or that your employer has waived such
   rights for your Contributions to the Foundation.

2. Each Contribution is Your original creation. You represent that your
   submissions include complete details of any third-party license or
   restriction of which you are aware and which are associated with any
   part of your Contributions.

3. Your Contribution does not, to the best of your knowledge, violate
   any third party's copyrights, trademarks, patents, trade secrets, or
   other intellectual property rights.

4. If You are an individual, You are of legal age to enter into a
   binding contract in the jurisdiction in which You reside.

---

### 5. No Obligation

You are not expected to provide support for Your Contributions except
to the extent You desire. You may provide support for free, for a fee,
or not at all.

---

### 6. Disclaimer of Warranty

UNLESS REQUIRED BY APPLICABLE LAW OR AGREED TO IN WRITING, YOU PROVIDE
YOUR CONTRIBUTIONS ON AN "AS IS" BASIS, WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS
OF ANY KIND, EITHER EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING WITHOUT LIMITATION ANY
WARRANTIES OF TITLE, NON-INFRINGEMENT, MERCHANTABILITY, OR FITNESS FOR
A PARTICULAR PURPOSE.

---

### 7. Limitation of Liability

IN NO EVENT SHALL YOU BE LIABLE TO THE FOUNDATION OR ANY RECIPIENT OF
THE WORK FOR ANY DAMAGES, INCLUDING ANY DIRECT, INDIRECT, SPECIAL,
INCIDENTAL, OR CONSEQUENTIAL DAMAGES ARISING AS A RESULT OF THIS
AGREEMENT OR OUT OF THE USE OR INABILITY TO USE THE WORK.

---

### 8. Future Versions

The Foundation may publish new versions of this Agreement. Contributions
submitted after publication of a new version are governed by that version
unless You explicitly agree to a different version.

---

### 9. Entire Agreement

This Agreement constitutes the entire agreement between You and the
Foundation regarding Your Contributions and supersedes all prior

---

### 10. Governing Law

This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the State of Indiana,
United States of America, without regard to conflict of law provisions.
